L1.basic_logs.description: Has logs, health checks, or logging code.

L1.basic_security.description: Has basic secret-exclusion or security files.

L1.setup_surface.description: Has setup or environment entry points.

L1.tests_present.description: Has a test tree or test files.

L2.security_docs.description: Documents secret, PII, or security handling.

L2.test_docs.description: Documents test commands or test policy.

L3.doc_validation.description: Has documentation validation or generated-doc tooling.

L3.machine_task_index.description: Has structured or indexed task coordination.

L3.repro_build.description: Uses reproducible build metadata or lock/config files.

L3.structured_obs.description: Has structured logs, trace, or metrics plumbing.

L4.analysis_reports.description: Has analyzers or report generators over logs/traces.

L4.build_speed.description: Has build caching, profiling, or optimized build lanes.

L4.fast_safe_tests.description: Has parallel, flaky, or safety-aware test controls.

L4.generated_docs.description: Builds or refreshes docs/site/wiki from sources.

L4.prioritized_tasks.description: Prioritizes tasks with dependencies and reporting rules.

L4.replay_analysis.description: Can replay/analyze experiments without rerunning them.

L4.security_audit.description: Has security-review, audit, or hardening surfaces.

L5.agent_doc_loop.description: Agents have durable handoff/progress documentation loops.

L5.auto_eval_gates.description: Has automated eval/safety gates for candidate changes.

L5.auto_remediation_queue.description: Has an autopilot/remediation queue or self-running lab.

L5.autonomous_security_review.description: Has agent-usable security review or policy gates.
